title: The interpretation of the parable to mean I sell all my possessions for Jesus functions to obfuscate the love of Jesus that he showed through giving up all his possessions to purchase us as his treasure on the one hand, and the demand to show Jesus love by trying to purchase/win the brethren in order to manifest the gospel as priests to the world?
body: The interpretation of the parable to mean I sell all my possessions for Jesus functions to obfuscate the love of Jesus that he showed through giving up all his possessions to purchase us as his treasure on the one hand, and the demand to show Jesus love by trying to purchase/win the brethren in order to manifest the gospel as priests to the world?

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: Do the priests reenact the ritual meal on Sinai with the weekly Shabbat bread of the face/presence internally like a living digital picture frame to remind/ memorialize/testify to those in heaven (and those on earth) that God loves Israel, by the priests loving on each other , sharing a ritual meal as brothers?
